calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Peppina Thompson, #7433.

David S. Roberson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 2005 San Jose, LLC.
Dismissals entered against defendants D.A.M. Construction and Danilo A. Moran on May 12, 2008. Dismissal entered against defendant Augustine Castor on May 22, 2008. No appearance by defendant Mark Mattson.
Default entered against defendant Mark Mattson on May 7, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 12, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at Default Prove-Up Hearing was filed on June 20, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 2005 San Jose, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mark Mattson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,672,000.00.
Costs - $12,500.00, for a total of $3,684,500.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
